name: Gopalji Gaur
title: Machine Learning Engineer
bio: Always been interested in computers and engineering. My background is in ML research. I've worked with diffusion models and transformers, and lately most of my time goes into AI agents. I also build things for the web, this site included.
siteDescription: ML engineer with a background in ML research. Works with diffusion models, transformers, and AI agents.
